solutions.title: Solution (Neon)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
=
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val
(
n
,
k
)
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
val s
=
readLine
()!!
val used
=
BooleanArray
(
n
)
{
false
}
var
cnt
=
s
.
count
({
it
==
'1'
})
var
pos
=
0
while
(
cnt
>
0
)
{
used
[
pos
]
=
true
if
(
s
[
pos
]
==
'1'
)
--
cnt
if
(
cnt
==
0
)
break
var
lft
=
k
while
(
lft
>
0
)
{
pos
=
(
pos
+
1
)
%
n
if
(!
used
[
pos
])
--
lft
;
}
}
println
(
used
.
count
({
it
}))
}
